query:
SELECT id, entity, status, error_message, DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') as started
FROM sync_logs WHERE section='boonphone' AND status='error' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT id, entity, status, error_message, DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') as started
FROM sync_logs WHERE section='boonphone' AND status='error' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
